docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - YANYUAN GUO(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - REFUSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD; [HANDWRITTEN: PLEASE FORWARD - NOT AT THIS ADDRESS])

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF YAN YUAN GUO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STEVEN LIU WITH FARMERS INSURANCE CLAIMS ADJUSTER ADAM CATIGAN. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUO, YANYUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, STEVEN $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,205.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, STEVEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $130.00) SERVED APR-12-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, STEVEN
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $130.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUO, YANYUAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUO, YANYUAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
